basic_details.short_information: Central University of Andhra Pradesh (CUAP) Recruitment 2026 for 60 posts of Assistant Professor. Candidates Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 07-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CUAP official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) in concerned/relevant/allied subject, NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUAP to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: CUAP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 60 Posts
